flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ottawa University-Ottawa fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (25.7% → 19.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ottawa University-Ottawa fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (33.6% → 27.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Ottawa University-Ottawa vs the 2018–2022 baseline (28.7% vs 38.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ottawa University-Ottawa fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
